title: Replacement Evaporator Fan Motor for Refrigerator, EAU63923603 Freezer Cooling Fan Motor, # Replacing 4877339, AP6317197, EAU65058305, EAU63923606, PS12383671, PD00045140
features: Deal with Problems: Consider replacing the refrigerator fan motor if the refrigerator has the problems of high temperature, insufficient cooling, abnormal noise, no cooling at all and downtime problems due to aging or damaged cooling fan
Stable Performance: Accelerates the cooling speed and optimizes the cooling cycle. The evaporator fan motor effectively reduces the internal temperature and keeps food fresher longer
Robust Material: Made of robust ABS plastic housing and metal internal circuit, ensuring great corrosion-resistance and long service life
Replacement Part: The refrigerator evaporator fan motor' s model number is EAU63923603, can replace with AP6317197, EAU65058305, PS12383671, EAP12383671, EAU63923606, PD00045140, 4877339
description: Feature: Fault Repair: Consider replacing the refrigerator fan motor if the refrigerator is suffering from the following problems: high refrigerator temperature, insufficient cooling, abnormal noise, no cooling at all and other disturbances, as well as downtime problems due to aging or damaged fan.
